channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Full transcript of 'Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan,' June 7, 2026
item.description: On this broadcast of 'Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan,' Reps. Ro Khanna and Don Bacon join Margaret Brennan.

item.title: WATCH: KAT's touching tribute to his late mother
item.description: After playing a key role in the Knicks' thrilling Game 2 Finals win, Karl-Anthony Towns reflects on his late mother and the strength he draws from her.

item.title: WATCH: Pope Leo's historic visit to Spain
item.description: Madrid authorities reported that more than 500,000 people gathered for the pope's visit as he began his first papal trip to Spain.

item.title: Maverick GOP Sen. Packwood of Oregon, who resigned after scandal, dies at 93
item.description: The scandal tarnished his reputation as a champion of abortion and women's rights.
